name: Jordan Doerksen
headline: Reliable laborer with railway, warehouse, and roofing experience.
summary: I’m a reliable labourer with hands-on experience in rail operations, warehouse logistics, and roofing. I prioritize safety, follow procedures closely, and work well both independently and as part of a team to meet deadlines and productivity goals.

experience.title: Canadian National Railway — Conductor / Engineering Department
bullets: Worked in rail operations with a focus on safety, teamwork, and procedure.
Held conductor and engineering department certifications.
Handled responsibilities in a high-pressure, fast-moving environment.

experience.title: Aimco International — Order Picker / Forklift Driver
bullets: Loaded, unloaded, and moved freight and materials.
Operated forklifts safely and followed site procedures.
Helped keep warehouse operations organized and efficient.

experience.title: Amazon — Fulfillment Associate
bullets: Picked and processed orders accurately and efficiently.
Used RF headset, IR scanner, pallet jack, and lift truck equipment.
Supported productivity goals in a high-volume warehouse environment.

experience.title: Sobeys Distribution Centre — Order Picker
bullets: Operated warehouse equipment to support package flow and order fulfillment.
Worked accurately in a busy distribution setting.
Helped meet timing and quality expectations.

experience.title: SKP Roofing Inc. — Labourer / Roofer
bullets: Assisted with roofing and cladding installation on residential and commercial properties.
Worked from instructions and completed tasks with minimal supervision.
Kept the work area clean and safe.

interests.title: Music — Guitar & Composition
interests.desc: Write and record music across styles; practiced instrument technique and composition.

interests.title: Coding & Small Projects
interests.desc: Experiment with new languages and build compact Python tools for automation and prototyping.

interests.title: 3D Modeling & Printing
interests.desc: Design and print practical items like self-watering seed starters, desk organizers, and pegboard walls.

interests.title: Hardware Enclosures & Tooling
interests.desc: Create custom cases and organizers for Raspberry Pi and audio gear; focus on fit and durability.
